product_visual_description: Mini telecamera spia DIY composta da due elementi collegati da un flat cable nero e un cavo rosso: 1) modulo corpo principale nero opaco a forma di rettangolo (circa 48×29×10mm) con griglia a motivo chevron/X in rilievo sulla superficie, connettore JST rosso nella parte inferiore; 2) micro-obiettivo cilindrico nero separato (diametro ~8mm) montato su staffa metallica, con lente frontale a iride blu-trasparente. Il flat cable nero sottile collega i due elementi. Nella foto reference appare anche uno smartphone con schermo che mostra il feed video di un salotto, e la mano di una persona che regge il modulo principale per mostrarne le dimensioni ridotte. Colori dominanti: nero opaco, rosso brillante (#E8000D), metallo grigio.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Mini Telecamera Spia WiFi DIY 1080P.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- For images 02, 04, 06, 09: integrate the brand logo (SECOND image_input) per LOGO INTEGRATION RULES.
- For images 01a, 01b, 03, 05, 07, 08: behave exactly as NO_LOGO — DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER TEXT. DO NOT LEAVE EMPTY SPACE RESERVED FOR A LOGO — fill the full composition.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER', or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

images.name: Hero Sfondo Bianco
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Mini Telecamera Spia WiFi DIY 1080P.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
For this image (01a): NO LOGO, NO TEXT, NO WATERMARK, NO PLACEHOLDER. Fill the full composition.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Extract as a pixel-perfect photographic cutout: the black rectangular main module (48×29×10mm) with chevron/X-pattern grille, red JST connector at bottom, black flat cable, thin red wire, and the detached micro-lens unit (tiny black cylinder ~8mm diameter with blue-tinted iris lens) on its metal bracket. Keep all proportions, colors, textures exactly as photographed. Also include the smartphone element from the reference showing the live interior room feed on screen, positioned naturally above-right as in the original composition. The hand from the reference may be excluded to keep the hero clean.

STEP 2 — BACKGROUND:
Pure white background RGB(255,255,255). Absolutely no gradient, no texture, no shadow on background. Optionally a very faint natural drop shadow directly under the product (5% opacity, 0px blur, 8px offset) to give product grounding. NO text. NO logo. NO watermark. NO empty reserved space. Canvas: 2000x2000px. Product centered, occupying approximately 70-75% of canvas height, slight tilt matching reference if present.

images.prompt:

This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.

THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.

If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
For this image (01b): NO LOGO, NO TEXT, NO WATERMARK, NO PLACEHOLDER. Fill the full composition.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO RADAR SCAN:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Extract the full composition as a pixel-perfect photographic cutout: black rectangular main module with chevron/X-pattern grille, red JST connector, black flat cable, red wire, detached micro-lens cylinder with blue-tinted iris, smartphone with interior room display. All textures, colors (black matte #1A1A1A, red #E8000D, metallic grey lens bracket) preserved exactly. Product is on a SEPARATE UNTOUCHABLE LAYER. Centered on canvas, occupying ~70% canvas height.
IF ANY BACKGROUND EFFECT BLEEDS ONTO THE PRODUCT — THAT IS A FAILURE.

STEP 2 — ADD BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background: deep navy-black #050A18.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the product pixels:
- Concentric radar sweep arcs in electric blue #00BFFF radiating from the position of the micro-lens, opacity 60-80%, thin stroke 1.5px, 8 arcs at expanding radii.
- Electromagnetic grid overlay: fine orthogonal grid lines #00BFFF at 3% opacity across entire background.
- Radar sweep animation freeze-frame: one bright arc sector (#00BFFF to transparent) at 40% opacity sweeping clockwise from lens position.
- Subtle radial glow ONLY on background directly behind lens position: #00BFFF circular gradient 0% to transparent, radius ~300px, 30% opacity. This glow must NOT touch the product.
- Fine particle dots #00BFFF scattered across background, size 1-2px, 25% opacity.
- Scan lines: horizontal faint lines #00BFFF at 2% opacity across full background.
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO empty space reserved for logo. Full canvas filled.

Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:

Background: deep dark navy gradient from #0A1628 (top-left) to #050A18 (bottom-right). Subtle diagonal geometric line pattern #00BFFF at 3% opacity across entire canvas.

LEFT 55% of canvas:
Product cutout pixel-perfect from reference — main module + micro-lens + flat cable + red wire + smartphone with room feed. Positioned centrally in left half, occupying ~80% of left zone height. No effects ON the product.

RIGHT 45% of canvas:
TOP: Headline in bold italic white sans-serif, 2 lines:
"SORVEGLIANZA
SENZA LIMITI"
(font size ~72px equivalent at 2000px canvas, tracking tight, uppercase)

Below headline, 5 benefit rows with electric blue #00BFFF checkmark (✓) icons:
✓ "Video Full HD 1080P nitido" (white bold, ~44px)
  thin separator line #00BFFF 15% opacity
✓ "Rilevamento movimento istantaneo" (white bold)
  thin separator
✓ "Visione remota da smartphone" (white bold)
  thin separator
✓ "Registrazione in loop su SD 32G" (white bold)
  thin separator
✓ "Microfono integrato, audio chiaro" (white bold)

Each benefit: checkmark #00BFFF bold left, text white regular right. Line height comfortable, rows evenly spaced filling right zone from ~25% to ~85% canvas height.

BOTTOM RIGHT: small accent tag #00BFFF background, white text "INCLUDE SD 32GB" rounded rectangle ~180px wide.

Fill entire canvas — no empty corners.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

Card 5: icon 🔌 "ALIMENTAZIONE" / "Batterie 18650" (white bold, blue label)

Accent line #00BFFF 3px full width.
Bold white italic: "TUTTO IN SOLI 48mm" — #00BFFF accent on the number.

Fill entire 2000×2000px canvas with no dead zones.

images.name: Garanzia e Trust
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Mini Telecamera Spia WiFi DIY 1080P.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 09 — GARANZIA E TRUST:

Background: very dark #060A14 with faint chevron/diamond pattern #00BFFF at 4% opacity (echoing product surface texture). Subtle vignette: edges darker than center.
Thin electric blue #00BFFF 3px border frame around entire canvas (inset 20px from edge).

TOP CENTER:
"ACQUISTO PROTETTO" — white bold uppercase ~66px, letter-spacing 5px.
Sub-line: "LA TUA SICUREZZA È LA NOSTRA PRIORITÀ" — #00BFFF medium, ~34px.
Accent bar #00BFFF 2px, 50% width centered.

MAIN ZONE: 2×2 grid of 4 trust badge cards.
Each card: dark #0D1628 background, border #00BFFF 1.5px, border-radius 20px, generous padding.

TOP-LEFT badge:
  Icon 🛡️ large #00BFFF, ~90px.
  "GARANZIA 2 ANNI" — white bold, ~44px.
  "Prodotto garantito" — grey #8899BB, ~28px.

TOP-RIGHT badge:
  Icon 🚀 large #00BFFF, ~90px.
  "SPEDIZIONE RAPIDA" — white bold, ~44px.
  "Consegna veloce e sicura" — grey #8899BB, ~28px.

BOTTOM-LEFT badge:
  Icon ✅ large #00BFFF, ~90px.
  "QUALITÀ CERTIFICATA" — white bold, ~44px.
  "Testata e approvata" — grey #8899BB, ~28px.

BOTTOM-RIGHT badge:
  Icon 💬 large #00BFFF, ~90px.
  "ASSISTENZA ITALIANA" — white bold, ~44px.
  "Supporto dedicato" — grey #8899BB, ~28px.

BOTTOM: product cutout (full composite from reference) centered, ~280px wide, above a dark footer band #050A18 full width containing white text: "INCLUDE SCHEDA SD 32GB · CAVO USB · GARANZIA INCLUSA" — white bold ~32px, #00BFFF bullet separators.

Full canvas filled — no dead zones — all four badge cards large and prominent.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos visible on product. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image. No low-resolution cutouts. No product reinterpretation or simplification. No cartoon lens. No illustrated cables. No fake or invented product components not present in the reference photo. No English text in any visible graphic element.
